data.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended: Connect F1TV access with Token Helper

data_description.live_timing_auth_header: Manual backup if Token Helper pairing does not work. Paste the full Bearer token from the F1TV Token Helper only as an advanced fallback. Leave blank to use public live timing only.
data_description.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended path. Start a short-lived pairing session and send the token from the browser extension without copying it manually. F1TV access is optional; public live timing continues without it.

data.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended: Connect F1TV access with Token Helper

data_description.live_timing_auth_header: Manual backup if Token Helper pairing does not work. Paste a new full Bearer token only as an advanced fallback. Leave blank to keep the current value.
data_description.clear_live_timing_auth_header: Remove the saved F1TV authorization value and continue with public live timing only.
data_description.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended path. Start a short-lived pairing session and send the token from the browser extension without copying it manually. F1TV access is optional; public live timing continues without it.

data.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended: Connect F1TV access with Token Helper

data_description.live_timing_auth_header: Manual backup if Token Helper pairing does not work. Paste a new full Bearer token only as an advanced fallback.
data_description.clear_live_timing_auth_header: Remove the saved F1TV authorization value and continue with public live timing only.
data_description.start_f1tv_pairing: Recommended path. Start a short-lived pairing session and send the token from the browser extension without copying it manually. F1TV access is optional; public live timing continues without it.

f1tv_pairing.title: Connect F1TV access
f1tv_pairing.description: Use the F1TV Token Helper to send your token to Home Assistant. F1TV access is optional, and this pairing expires at {expires_at}.

error.replay_required: Select a replay dump file when Development mode is enabled.
error.replay_missing: Replay dump file not found or unreadable.
error.auth_header_required: Enter the F1TV authorization value or select clear.
error.invalid_auth_header: Enter a valid Bearer token value.
error.auth_token_missing_exp: The token does not include an expiry time.
error.auth_token_expiring_soon: The token expires too soon. Generate a new token and try again.

abort.f1tv_pairing_unavailable: F1TV pairing is not available in this build.
abort.f1tv_pairing_failed: F1TV pairing did not complete. Start a new pairing session and try again.

f1tv_token_attention_required.title: F1TV live timing token needs attention

data_description.live_timing_auth_header: Paste a new Bearer token value from the F1TV Token Helper for F1TV access.
data_description.clear_live_timing_auth_header: Remove the saved F1TV token and continue with public live timing only.

confirm.description: The saved F1TV token for {name} needs attention. Public live timing continues to work, but F1TV live data will not be used until the token is replaced.
confirm.title: Update F1TV live timing token
